description: Implement phone number verification for customers and guests using Infobip OTP SMS service

phases.name: Backend Infrastructure & Database
phases.description: Set up database schema and backend services

tasks.name: Database Schema Updates
tasks.description: Update profiles table and create verification sessions table
tasks.notes: Add phone_verified, phone_verified_at fields to profiles table

tasks.name: Infobip Integration Setup
tasks.description: Configure Infobip API and create SMS templates
tasks.notes: Set up API credentials, message templates, and OTP generation

tasks.name: Backend API Endpoints
tasks.description: Create Supabase Edge Functions for verification
tasks.notes: Create three Edge Functions for the verification flow

phases.name: Core Verification System
phases.description: Build the core verification components and services

tasks.name: Phone Verification Modal Component
tasks.description: Create reusable modal for verification interface
tasks.notes: Include phone input, OTP input, and status messaging

tasks.name: Verification Service Layer
tasks.description: Create service functions for verification logic
tasks.notes: Phone validation, OTP handling, and verification status management

tasks.name: Global State Management
tasks.description: Create context for app-wide verification state
tasks.notes: Manage verification status across the application

tasks.name: Profile Page Updates
tasks.description: Update profile display and verification integration
tasks.notes: Show verification status and integrate verification modal

tasks.name: Edit Profile Modal Updates
tasks.description: Add phone verification flow to profile editing
tasks.notes: Integrate verification when editing phone numbers

tasks.name: Contact Form Updates
tasks.description: Add verification button and update phone field behavior
tasks.notes: Add verification button below phone input field

tasks.name: Booking Validation
tasks.description: Add phone verification requirement to booking submission
tasks.notes: Check verification status before allowing booking submission

tasks.name: Guest Verification Flow
tasks.notes: Store verification status in session storage for guests

tasks.name: Cross-page Verification Persistence
tasks.notes: Handle page refreshes and navigation while maintaining status

phases.name: Testing & Polish
phases.description: Test integration and polish user experience

tasks.name: Integration Testing
tasks.notes: Test all verification scenarios and error cases

tasks.name: UI/UX Polish
tasks.description: Improve styling, loading states, and accessibility
tasks.notes: Add loading states, animations, and accessibility improvements

nextSteps: Set up database schema for phone verification
notes: This implementation will require Infobip API credentials and may need environment variable configuration. The feature should not impact admin booking functionality.
